final_text: {"file":"django/forms/fields.py","class":"FileField","method":"clean","parent_class":"Field","fix_summary":"The `clean()` method sits above `to_python()` and handles all three states: it raises a `ValidationError` with the `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION` error when the widget detects contradictory input (new file uploaded AND clear checkbox checked), returns `False` when `data is False` (user clicked 'clear'), returns the `initial` value unchanged when no new data is provided (user left the field alone), and only delegates to `super().clean()` — which calls `to_python()` — when an actual new file upload is present."}

parsed_answer.fix_summary: The `clean()` method sits above `to_python()` and handles all three states: it raises a `ValidationError` with the `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION` error when the widget detects contradictory input (new file uploaded AND clear checkbox checked), returns `False` when `data is False` (user clicked 'clear'), returns the `initial` value unchanged when no new data is provided (user left the field alone), and only delegates to `super().clean()` — which calls `to_python()` — when an actual new file upload is present.
